title: Saltillo, Coahuila — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Saltillo, Coahuila: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Saltillo is a city in Coahuila with a population of 864,431. Historic capital of Coahuila known for its automobile industry, Sarape textiles, and pleasant climate.
